title: catha linearis
intro: Catha linearis, also known as Khat, is a flowering plant native to the Horn of Africa and the Arabian Peninsula. It has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include stimulating the central nervous system and increasing alertness. The health benefits associated with Catha linearis include improved mental clarity, increased energy, and appetite suppression, making it a popular herb among traditional healers. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, infusions, and chewing the leaves, although the latter is discouraged due to potential addiction issues.
